steps.title: Introduce the renamed list
steps.content: The phrase after the blank, the Hawai'i Register of Historic Places, identifies the important list being discussed. The punctuation must introduce that renaming phrase.

steps.title: Avoid fragments and fused nouns
steps.content: B leaves the register name as a fragment, C misuses a semicolon before a noun phrase, and D strings the two nouns together without showing their relationship. A colon properly introduces the name of the list. The answer is A.
